title: feat(gen): build with Vite so .md raw imports work
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Teaching the generator to read
gist.blurb: We've upgraded the build system for our text generation worker to use Vite. This lets it natively import markdown files, keeping our docs and code perfectly in sync.
gist.summary: Migrated the gen worker build process to Vite to support raw markdown imports.
gist.impact: Developers can now import markdown files directly into the gen worker code, fixing production build errors.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot and the robot companion working together on a construction site or factory line (representing the build system). The robot is reading a markdown document (representing the .md import fix).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny yellow hard hat, hovering next to a chunky monitor-headed robot. The robot is happily reading a pixelated markdown document. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny yellow hard hat, hovering next to a chunky monitor-headed robot. The robot is happily reading a pixelated markdown document. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites.
